一話人無食藥，冷氣軍師，就會停止思考、停止去理解一些自己未有能力消化到的觀點。

這是不能突破自身思考和戰術盲點、不能提升智力和戰果的原因

陳雲：梁天琦系的勇武派最危險。狡兔死，走狗烹。提醒大家，勇武派被泛民犧牲的危險。這幾次在網上論壇發起的示威活動，已經有前線勇武者發現中伏，差役在關鍵的時候會在沿途的隱蔽之處大舉飛撲出來捉人。
懷疑這是泛民設下的局，在明年立法會選舉開始的時候，困鎖大部分梁天琦系的活躍者在獄中，用黃之鋒等香港眾志的明星來收割選票。
這個佈局也是合理的。泛民是收了財閥是指使來主導反送中運動，捆綁無辜市民上轎（送中條例是用來捉拿財閥敲詐勒索的，與普通小市民並無切身關係！），勇武派和陳雲將美國引入香港議程，泛民現在派新泛民來收割，也與共產黨妥協，用拘捕陷阱打殘甚至殺害強姦勇武派（尤其是梁天琦系），令他們終身傷痛，恢復市面平靜，給共產黨、地產財閥及國際財閥繼續在香港做生意，並且用普選來沖喜一下。
這種卑鄙的陽謀，我在本星期的沙龍講座講出來。
跟隨陳雲思想的勇武派過往不會爭議席，但梁天琦系的年輕勇武派大部分需要職業前景和活動補貼，他們一直在爭議席，但梁天琦又被困監獄，無法出來領導選舉，結果戰果會被新泛民收割！這是梁天琦系危險的地方。我一向呼籲釋放梁天琦，就是給梁天琦系適當的領導和議席報酬。我的大佈局和寬宏氣度，遠遠超過偽港獨可以想像的



一年後睇返 覺得國師又中

https://www.marketwatch.com/story/my-3-d-printing-company-is-making-thousands-of-coronavirus-test-swabs-a-day-heres-how-we-did-it-2020-04-07?mod=home-page

美國國力既強大，係因為democracy,有innovative
Formlabs went from a prototype in mid-March to clinical tests to production in a matter of weeks

Swabs to test for the coronavirus are being made with 3-D printers to help meet demand. courtesy Formlabs

When we started Formlabs nine years ago, I couldn’t have predicted that we’d go from manufacturing 3-D printers and developing resins to producing medical equipment to fight a pandemic. But as we heard about shortages of essential medical devices and products needed to provide lifesaving care in the wake of the novel coronavirus, I realized Formlabs could help.

Hospitals and clinicians were already using Formlabs 3-D printers and resins to create 3-D printed parts such as physical models of patients’ anatomies from CT/MRI data and surgical guides for oral surgery. As the need for more medical equipment became clear, we began working with our current medical partners as well as many others across the country to support their needs. Our primary response was focused on test swabs because the demand for the COVID-19 test kit components had far outpaced the supply of the two main factories — one in hard-hit northern Italy and one in Maine — that typically produce the swabs.

The development of 3-D printed swabs to test for the coronavirus — which are now approved to use on patients — offers a guide on how to produce these supplies quickly, efficiently and with clinical validation.

We worked with Northwell Health, a New York area health-care network, and University of South Florida (USF) Health on the design and production of the coronavirus test swabs in mid-March as cases began rapidly spreading across the country. A team at USF Health created the initial design, and we began developing prototypes and securing materials for a 3-D-printed alternative to the version now in short supply.

The result is a 3-D printed swab that is a flexible stick with a bristled end that is inserted deep inside a patient’s nose and swept around to collect samples that stick to or wick up the bristles. The swab also has a breaking point that allows it to be easily placed in a vial and capped for testing in a lab.

One weekend, working through the night
The design and prototype for the swabs were developed over one weekend with clinicians from USF Health and 3-D printing experts from Formlabs working through the night. The 3-D-printed swabs were then tested by clinicians at Northwell Health, USF Health, and Tampa General Hospital for patient safety and comfort over the following week. It is important the medical devices that we supply to health-care professionals on the front lines of fighting this pandemic work effectively and don’t put workers or their patients at risk.

Now that initial clinical trials are complete, Formlabs is starting to produce these swabs at scale in our Ohio-based printing facility southeast of Toledo. With close to 200 3-D printers on-site, we will be able to produce up to 100,000 swabs a day at peak capacity. We are currently ramping up production and will be at this capacity in the coming weeks.

https://www.marketwatch.com/story/my-3-d-printing-company-is-making-thousands-of-coronavirus-test-swabs-a-day-heres-how-we-did-it-2020-04-07?mod=home-page

More hospitals may use the swabs
These swabs are currently being used on patients at Northwell Health, USF Health and Tampa General. Formlabs has sent additional samples of these swabs along with relevant documentation to other hospital systems experiencing shortages so they can be evaluated for use. USF Health has posted a WIRB application to allow other sites to join its protocol (WIRB # 20200779, Protocol 3DSWAB001) and add to the existing body of knowledge.

Formlabs and its hospital partners have FDA clearance through the recently announced Policy for Diagnostic Tests for COVID-19 related devices, which classifies the swabs as Class 1 Exempt devices, meaning they are exempt from the typical regulatory requirements. As long as the swabs are manufactured at FDA-registered facilities with Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) in place, like Formlabs’ Ohio ISO-13485-certified facility, and the design has been tested and validated by the hospitals’ institutional review boards (IRBs), they are compliant.

[url]https://www.marketwatch.com/story/heres-how-3-d-printing-can-help-in-the-fight-fight-against-the-coronavirus-2020-03-20?mod=article_inline
[/url]

Today, troops travel with mobile 3-D printers. They create the parts they need on the spot and in volatile situations. The U.S. Marines, for example, use a metal 3-D printer to create vehicle and weapon parts in the Indo-Pacific region — a decision that frees up teams who would otherwise spend hours carving parts out of metal blocks and avoids the downtime associated with ordering from the United States.

香港人，不要太易呃

我們都很討厭人血饅頭，偏偏有個日本人，在香港Busking 5年，賺很多，賣很多，街頭巨星一樣。

Busking界朋友就知，他平日賺很多，賣CD、親筆簽名卡，未計途人打賞，賺到的數字，遠超香港普通打工仔。

最近幾個月，疫情導致賺少了，現在便喊苦「難以付上昂貴機票回日本」，高舉十年如一日的「香港人加油」，「以歌聲為香港人打氣」... 一晚之間，連續post幾次Payme / PayPal link，呼籲港人捐錢。

預了有人話我，「搞分化」、「人哋搵錢關你咩事？」對，你畀錢佢，當然不關我事。但錯誤投射他是手足，就是大問題。實際很多人Payme完他，又留言「願榮光歸香港」，又寫上「五大訴求」、「手足加油」。

認清事實，這個人不是「手足」。持續多月的反修例運動，香港人最水深火熱的時候，他一首「願榮光歸香港」也沒有唱過，縱使是有日文版。理大打緊仗的時候，他仍在街頭唱著忍者亂太郎，仍在賣最平100元的親筆簽名卡。

心水清的香港人，已沒有叫「香港人加油」很久了。

真正要幫的，是已還柙5個月，申請保釋被拒的消防員，無法看細仔出生，妻子患產後抑鬱...... 很多很多，我們欠「手足」太多太多。

VCP其實係解Volatility Compression Patterns (VCP)
通常一隻股票係一個一浪高於一浪既升勢／或者剛剛成功轉向既時侯，個股票可能因為大市拉回，而形成一個底部區。而個底部區既特性就係個波幅會愈來愈窄。


例如NVDA 2019年既時間 見左底。

你見到左邊2019年8月至9月個時 有一個底部區，當時上下波幅大概係17％左右，之後10月開始向上突破之前，都有一個細既底部區 上下波幅就10.41%到，之後就向上突破紅色橫線 （買點）之後，突破爆上，升左70％。

基本上，2019年8月到10月就係一個完整既VCP,
因為佢係一個Cup比另一個Cup 既上下波幅窄，之後成功向上突破

通常一隻股票係一個一浪高於一浪既升勢／或者剛剛成功轉向既時侯，個股票可能因為大市拉回，而形成一個底部區。而個底部區既特性就係個波幅會愈來愈窄。


例如NVDA 2019年既時間 見左底。

你見到左邊2019年8月至9月個時 有一個底部區，當時上下波幅大概係17％左右，之後10月開始向上突破之前，都有一個細既底部區 上下波幅就10.41%到，之後就向上突破紅色橫線 （買點）之後，突破爆上，升左70％。

基本上，2019年8月到10月就係一個完整既VCP,
因為佢係一個Cup比另一個Cup 既上下波幅窄，之後成功向上突破

https://www.cnbc.com/2020/05/18/moderna-reports-positive-data-on-early-stage-coronavirus-vaccine-trial.html

Moderna’s closely watched early-stage human trial for a coronavirus vaccine produced Covid-19 antibodies in all 45 participants, the biotech company announced Monday.

Each participant was assigned to receive a 25 microgram, 100 mcg or 250 mcg dose, with 15 people in each dose group. Study participants received two doses of the potential vaccine via intramuscular injection in the upper arm approximately 28 days apart. Data on a second dose was not available for the 250 mcg group, the company said.

At day 43, or two weeks following the second dose, levels of binding antibodies in the 25 mcg group were at the levels generally seen in blood samples from people who recovered from the disease, the company said. Antibodies in the 100 mcg had antibodies that “significantly exceeded levels” in recovered patients.

The vaccine also produced neutralizing antibodies against Covid-19 in at least eight participants, the company said. Four participants were assigned to receive a 25 microgram dose, while the other four received 100 mcg. Levels of neutralizing antibodies were at or above levels in blood samples, the company said. Data on neutralizing antibodies for the other participants were not yet available, Moderna said.

These interim Phase 1 data, while early, demonstrate that vaccination with mRNA-1273 elicits an immune response of the magnitude caused by natural infection starting with a dose as low as 25 µg,” Tal Zaks, the chief medical officer at Moderna, said in s statement.

“When combined with the success in preventing viral replication in the lungs of a pre-clinical challenge model at a dose that elicited similar levels of neutralizing antibodies, these data substantiate our belief that mRNA-1273 has the potential to prevent COVID-19 disease and advance our ability to select a dose for pivotal trials,” Zaks added.

There are formally approved treatments for Covid-19, which has killed at least 315,225 and sickened 4.7 million people worldwide since emerging from the Chinese city of Wuhan more than 4 months ago, according to data compiled by Johns Hopkins University.

Moderna has been fast-tracking work with the National Institutes of Health, an agency within the Department of Health and Human Services, to develop a vaccine.

The company said the vaccine was generally safe and well tolerated.

The potential vaccine by Moderna contains genetic material called messenger RNA, or mRNA, that was produced in a lab. The mRNA is a genetic code that tells cells what to build — in this case, an antigen that may induce an immune response for the virus.

The phase 1 trial took place at the Kaiser Permanente Washington Health Research Institute in Seattle, Washington. It tested the vaccine on 45 males and non-pregnant females between the ages of 18 and 55.

透過 HKG 分享一則貼文：陳雲：各位留在香港的大好友，等發達啦。
https://forum.hkgolden.com/thread/7238096/page/1

陳雲：政治市，國師午間教路。香港國安立法在北京人大審議，今日香港恆指應聲下跌一千點。
今日香港國師為各位投資者及資產持有者緊急做一下技術分析和前景評估。千金難買。香港、甚至全世界只有我識得做，也夠膽做。你這次不看，會做錯投資或移民決定，終身抱恨！
五月十九日，眾議院議員佩里Scott Perry提出法案，授權美國總統承認香港是獨立國家或其他目的。
法案的標題原文：H.R.6947 - To authorize the President to recognize the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China as a separate, independent country, and for other purposes.
其他目的，就是中美共管的美國自由州及英聯邦（大英國協）的成員（free state of USA and member of the British Commonwealth），這是香港的最佳、最安全的政治安頓，在中國政治動盪，出現主權懸空的時候，共產黨就會默許美國總統下這一手。也勞煩英國快點給BNO在英聯邦的居留權，排期九月通過啦，香港英國大家發財。我在《香港城邦論》寫清楚的，此書很快再版加印。我去年七月，主張同道去大阪的G20高峰會高舉美國旗，提醒一下特朗普總統，也是此意。他後來也說他看到很多美國旗、很多Trump signs，非常高興。
習近平總書記，只是一個在慈禧太后庇護下的光緒皇帝而已，況且當年割讓香港也為中國帶來長期好處，現在不單只割讓香港，還連著九龍新界一起來。光緒皇帝有進步了，再加一下深圳灣的地方和南海幾個群島的飛地更好。


將國家安全立法寫入附件三，是直接干預香港的自由經濟資訊流通和國際社會人士（特務啦！）活動，破壞香港一百多年來的自由城邦地位，這是美國斷然不能容忍的，故此特朗普總統有很大的反應！
人大的國安立法寫入香港基本法的附件三，直接執行，有幾個技術困難：
一、由於共產黨說，這次不必香港本地立法，這是中國用大陸法系及社會主義國家法系為普通法系的香港特別行政區立法，而且這次是全國人大決議來給人大常委做的，不是依照慣例是人大常委自己做的，政治壓力很大。這種立法要在香港法院審案的，要在執法機構調查和拘捕的，要成立香港情報局的。人大常委有這種預見能力嗎？不是說沒有，而是法律的執行後果是無法預見的，萬一情報局逮捕了共產黨中央政治局委員的親人，黨爭鬧上了香港的公開法院，哪怎辦辦？
二、唯一妥善的立法方式，也是要根據附件三，在香港本地立法，在諮詢期間有本地和國際社會發表意見，就好些《國歌法》一樣，2017年11月4日第十二屆全國人民代表大會常務委員會第三十次會議通過，加入附件三，但現在也是要在香港本地立法啊。這樣就是基本法二十三條立法，但又與二十三條立法不同，因為二十三條立法是香港自己提出的，被否決還可以再來，人大的國安立法被否決，就是丟臉，而且不能再來。
三、如此本地立法，是將全國人大的決議押到香港表決啦。但也無所謂，之前人大的8-31的政制過改革協議也是被香港立法會推翻的。共產黨來多一次給香港人打臉而已。不怕啦，共產黨最能忍的。
四、一旦國安條例要本地立法，諮詢期間，香港有很多示威遊行，加上全球經濟衰退，共產黨也真懂得利用時機來搞死自己的，天才啊！
在危機時期，你只能看陳雲的。總之，《香港城邦論》寫的中國特區+美國自由州+英聯邦成員，是香港的最佳出路。
各位留在香港的大好友，等發達啦。記得贊助下我的香港普選制度研究計劃及香港文化記錄機會，那是為將來的好香港預備着的。

IBD專欄】大盤持續上漲，標普500指數創新高；但部分龍頭股突現預警信號
13分鐘前 · 公開


Facebook（FB）、Netflix（NFLX）、蘋果（AAPL）、微軟（MSFT）、UnitedHealth（UNH）和亞馬遜（AMZN）等龍頭股均為IBD Leaderboard的成份股，且現時都在上漲，部分已接近高點，但這些股票的RS線在過去兩到三周內都出現了短期下滑。
龍頭股前景堪憂

龍頭股股價與相對强度線的背離令人擔憂，但也不必過於緊張，畢竟這些巨頭股尚未出現賣出訊號。這些股票的相對强度線下滑其實印證了近幾周的板塊輪動。能源、公用事業和運輸等週期性標普板塊的漲幅現時是遠大於其他板塊的。
但考慮到市場的巨大漲幅，還是謹慎行事比較明智，畢竟就是這些FAANG成份股和其他超大盤股將市場從新冠低谷中拉了出來。電晶體龍頭股英偉達（NVDA）、台積電（TSM）和英特爾（INTC）的RS線同樣出現了下滑，值得關注。在這三家公司中，英偉達的RS線走勢最佳。
週一的漲勢表明投資者仍對上週五的就業數據感到歡欣鼓舞。5月就業報告顯示，美國就業人數增加的同時失業率也在下降，令所有人大感意外。
但這一結果令人難以置信。或許是新冠封鎖導致數據不够準確，而且美國勞工部也指出，真正的失業率可能遠高於報告顯示的13.3%。

replies.msg:
其實點解會有整固形態？ 都係同機構投資者既活動有關

因為機構投資者建倉／操盤，要以波動性去計算個最大持倉，

用MSFT做例子，如果你係4月3日個周 最低位買
150入貨，我當你用波動率計過風險 只可以成個倉既5%去投落呢隻股票到
當股價升到上180左右既時侯，MSFT佔既比例 已經超過5%

所以機構可能會因為比例上超過5%,而賣走少部份既MSFT 去維持返5%既比例

而機構調整比例時侯既賣盤就會形成 整固區
因為有好多機構調整比率 而去慢慢賣出一部份，而好多唔夠貨既機構就會慢慢買入

所以整固區 其實係機構投資者調整倉位 所引致既現象

https://www.investors.com/research/ibd-stock-of-the-day/tdoc-stock-weathers-coronavirus-pandemic-telemedicine-companies-inflection/
Ibd推介呢隻股 TDOC
Telemedic company

Due to the coronavirus pandemic, the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services began paying physicians for telehealth services at the same rate as in-office visits. Further, regulators also suspended requirements that doctors only utilize videoconferencing tools that are compliant with the Health Insurance Portability and Compliance Act, or HIPAA. HIPAA was designed to secure health information.
It's important to note, Teladoc's services are HIPAA-compliant. But it remains to be seen how these regulatory decisions will play out post-coronavirus.
"While these rule changes are temporary, there have been support for making those permanent, instead of reverting back to what had been in place prior to the Covid-19 pandemic," Gill said in a separate report.
Notably, a new House bill introduced this month would make permanent Medicare coverage for federally qualified health centers and rural health clinics, she said. It's also important to note, the bill has bipartisan support.
Inflection For Telemedicine Companies?
All together, it bodes well for TDOC stock.
The pandemic has large employers and health plans looking into virtual health offerings. The use of financial incentives will also likely drive increased use of telemedicine companies' services post-coronavirus, Gill said. She expects utilization to accelerate markedly.
Following the coronavirus pandemic, the telemedicine company expects to add 12 million to 13 million new members this year. That's well ahead of where Teladoc expected to be this year, Gill said. She also noted a 90% retention rate for insurance plans using the firm's services.
